summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OSCILLATE underground techno collective site. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. POS system authentication, dashboard, and guest management fully functional.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, navigation, marquee, stats, gallery, events, artists, platform, footer)
Navigation links functional (HOME, EVENTS, ARTISTS, MIXES, COLLECTIVES, ABOUT, POS)
Event city filters working (ALL, BENGALURU, GOA, MUMBAI, MÜNCHEN)
Gallery displays 12 images in grid layout
POS PIN authentication working (PIN 1337 authenticates, wrong PIN shows error)
POS dashboard displays guest list, stats, and check-in functionality
POS search and filter functionality working
Responsive design working on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
